results.implementation: Added isLive to useIntelligence() destructure on line 24. Added conditional DEMO banner (bg-signal-warn/10 text-signal-warn) when !isLive and LIVE banner (bg-signal-up/10 text-signal-up) when isLive, placed between the hero section and main content div. Both banners use only Pearl Mineral V2 tokens. No business logic, routing, or data fetching was modified.

notes: §8 compliance restored. IntelligenceCommerce.tsx now renders a visible DEMO or LIVE banner based on the isLive flag returned by useIntelligence(). Pattern matches Intelligence.tsx reference implementation.
